title: Use of English — Test 2
explanation:
Use of English — A2 Test 2

More mixed A2 practice.

questions.text: There are [*a few|a little|much] apples in the bowl.
He [*grew up|grew on|grew off] in Scotland.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I'll call you if I ____ time. | *have | will have | had
She ____ to live in Paris. | *used | uses | is used
Can you ____ after my dog? | *look | make | do
The exam was ____ than I expected. | *easier | easy | easiest
He told me he [*would come|will come|comes] later.
While I was cooking, he [*was setting|set|sets] the table.
[*How many|How much|How long] students are there?
